title: XML specifications for all information return types - Canada.ca
content:
File information returns electronically (tax slips and summaries)

## XML specifications for all information return types – File information returns electronically (tax slips and summaries)

## To users of the Internet File Transfer (IFT) application
To avoid system errors, ensure all Name , Address , Country , and Province fields contain valid text (not filled with spaces). Remove empty optional tags and provide information in all mandatory fields. After making the necessary corrections, rename the file, clear your cache, log out of the system, and log back in before attempting to resubmit.

## Important Notice: Update to XML File Validation
Effective October 20, 2025 , a new validation has been introduced. To prevent your submission from being rejected, please remove all optional fields without values from your XML file.
You may be looking for:
- Get ready to file information returns electronically
- How to file information returns electronically
You must include a T619, Electronic Transmittal record to create a complete submission
- 2026 : T619, Electronic Transmittal : T619 , Electronic Transmittal (this version will be accepted for processing starting January 12, 2026 )
Note: Since January 2025 , all returns to be filed in a same submission must be the same information return type (ex; Only T4 information return types). The T5013-FIN and T5013 information return (slip and summary) must be submitted separately.
